title: mirabilis rotata
intro: Mirabilis rotata, also known as the round-winged four o'clock, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Mirabilis rotata include the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and fever, as well as its potential use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
